mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotel_room (room_id, room_no, room_type, price, status) VALUES (room_seq.nextval, #{roomNo}, #{roomType}, #{price}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hotel_room
isdel = 1
AND (room_no LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR room_type LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
SELECT room_id as roomId, room_no as roomNo, room_type as roomType, price, status, isdel, del_date as delDate FROM hotel_room WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND isdel = 1
